commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR reorders `SkillCard` metadata so title and summary render before tag/platform pills, adjusts grid-card footer CSS, and adds focused regression tests for the card order and footer grouping.

Reproducibility: yes. source and proof make this high-confidence: current main renders tags before the title/summary and uses footer flex expansion, while the baseline screenshots show that old layout on `/skills?view=grid`. I did not rerun the app locally, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can update the grid loading skeleton to match the new card order without a product decision.

target.title: Fix skill card metadata layout
target.body:
## Summary

- Move skill card tag/platform pills below the description.
- Keep the author and updated/stat rows grouped together at the bottom of grid cards.
- Add regression coverage for both layout rules.

## Linked Issue

- N/A

## Screenshots

Before/after screenshots are attached in the ClawHub UI proof comment:
https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub/pull/2465#issuecomment-4594179426

- [x] Screenshots/recordings attached, or `N/A`

## Behavioural Proof

Tested `/skills?view=grid` against the `Self-Improving + Proactive Agent` card. The candidate layout renders title, description, platform pills, then the grouped author/update footer.

- [x] Behavioural proof included, or `N/A`

## Security / Trust Impact

- [x] No security/trust impact
- [ ] Security/trust impact explained

## Data / Deploy Impact

- [x] No data/deploy impact
- [ ] Data/deploy impact explained

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run ci:static`
- [x] Focused tests for touched behavior: `bun run test src/__tests__/ui-design-contract.test.ts src/components/SkillCard.test.tsx`
- [ ] `bun run ci:unit` or `N/A` for docs/config-only: N/A, focused UI tests only
- [ ] Broader gate when required (`ci:types-build`, `ci:packages`, `ci:e2e-http`, `ci:playwright-smoke`, `test:pw:local-auth`, `proof:ui`): N/A for scoped card layout change
- [x] Other: `bun run lint`; `bun run format:check`; local before/after Playwright screenshots at 390px and 1440px widths
target.author: jesse-merhi

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
